final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Cricket Worldcup Management System",
  "backend_architecture": "Microservices architecture",
  "services": [
    "User Management Service",
    "Team Management Service",
    "Match Scheduling Service",
    "Results Tracking Service"
  ],
  "controllers": [
    "UserController",
    "TeamController",
    "MatchController"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Team",
    "Player",
    "Match"
  ],
  "repositories": [
    "UserRepository",
    "TeamRepository",
    "MatchRepository"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "/api/users",
    "/api/teams",
    "/api/matches"
  ],
  "validation_rules": [
    "User input validation for registration and login",
    "Team and player management input validation",
    "Match scheduling and results input validation"
  ],
  "security_implementation": [
    "JWT authentication for user sessions",
    "Encryption for sensitive data storage",
    "Access control and permissions for different user roles"
  ],
  "error_handling": [
    "Centralized error handling middleware",
    "Custom error messages for different API endpoints"
  ],
  "developer_notes": [
    "Ensure to follow the detailed API documentation provided",
    "Use the provided codebase as a starting point for development"
  ]
}
